summary: Iteration 130: Tested color-coordination for CosmicToolbar and SmartDock widget buttons. All buttons now have always-visible colored backgrounds/borders matching their function. All features verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CosmicToolbar and SmartDock now have color-coordinated buttons with always-visible tinting. ToolBtn and DockBtn components use 'color' prop for identity colors. Tap-to-expand reveals labels. Active states change labels (Zen->Stop Zen, Wake->Wake Off, dock items->Close [name]). Both components have drag handles for repositioning.

cosmic_toolbar_color_coordination.tap_to_expand: PASS - Clicking toolbar body expands to show labels

smart_dock_color_coordination.tap_to_expand: PASS - Clicking dock body expands to show labels

panel_functionality.tones_frequency_panel: PASS - data-testid='frequency-panel' opens with Solfeggio Tones
panel_functionality.mixer_panel: PASS - data-testid='dock-mixer-panel' opens with Production Console

active_state_labels.zen_active_label: PASS - Code shows label changes to 'Stop Zen' when meditating=true
active_state_labels.wake_active_label: PASS - Code shows label changes to 'Wake Off' when wakeWordEnabled=true
active_state_labels.dock_close_label: PASS - Code shows label changes to 'Close [name]' when panel is active

drag_functionality.toolbar_drag: PASS - Toolbar can be repositioned via drag handle
drag_functionality.dock_drag: PASS - Dock can be repositioned via drag handle

z_index_coexistence.both_visible: PASS - CosmicToolbar (z-index: 9998) and SmartDock (z-index: 79) coexist without conflicts
